title: Cashier: Max 10 Pinned Items with Selection Menu + Unified Search with Popup Suggestions

requirements.summary: Replace the current split Jasa/Barang product grid with a single unified product display panel showing a maximum of 10 pinned items at a time
acceptanceCriteria: The cashier product panel displays at most 10 items simultaneously
Items are no longer split into separate Jasa and Barang columns/sections
All 10 displayed items are clickable to add to the cart as before

file_operations.description: Remove the split grid layout for services and goods. Replace the two separate product grids with a single unified product display panel that shows only the items selected as pinned (maximum 10). Filter the displayed items based on a pinned items list stored in component state (to be managed by REQ-2). Ensure all displayed items remain clickable to add to cart. Remove the separate service/goods column headers and consolidate the product grid into one section.

requirements.summary: Add a 'Select Displayed Items' management menu/dialog that allows users to choose which specific inventory items (up to 10) are pinned and shown in the product panel
acceptanceCriteria: A button or gear icon opens a dialog/drawer listing all inventory items
User can select/deselect items to pin; selection is capped at 10
Selecting more than 10 items is prevented with a clear message
Saving the selection updates the product panel immediately
The selected pinned items persist across page reloads (stored in localStorage or backend settings)

file_operations.description: Add a button (e.g., gear icon or 'Pilih Barang Tampilan') near the product panel that opens a Dialog component. Inside the dialog, list all inventory items from the backend with checkboxes for selection. Implement logic to track selected items (up to 10) and display a warning toast if the user tries to select more than 10 items. On save, store the selected item IDs in localStorage under a key like 'cashier-pinned-items'. Load this selection on component mount to initialize the pinned items state. Ensure the product panel updates immediately when the user saves the selection.

Create a custom hook that manages the pinned items state for the cashier page. The hook should read from localStorage on mount (key: 'cashier-pinned-items'), return the list of pinned item IDs, and provide functions to update the pinned selection. Include logic to ensure the selection never exceeds 10 items. The hook should sync changes back to localStorage automatically.

requirements.summary: Replace the current separated search inputs (one for goods, one for services) with a single unified search bar that searches across all inventory items
acceptanceCriteria: There is exactly one search input field on the cashier page
The search queries across all inventory items regardless of type (barang or jasa)
The existing separate search inputs for goods and services are removed

file_operations.description: Remove the two separate search inputs for services and goods. Add a single unified search input field above the product panel. This search input will be used to filter inventory items across both goods and services categories. The search functionality will be extended in REQ-4 to show a popup with matching results.

requirements.summary: Implement a search popup/dropdown that appears when the user types at least 1–2 characters, showing matching inventory items and allowing direct add-to-cart from the popup
acceptanceCriteria: Typing in the search bar triggers a dropdown popup showing matching items filtered by name
The popup appears after at least 1 character is typed
Search results include items from both goods and services categories
Items already displayed in the 10-item pinned panel can also appear in search results
Clicking a search result item adds it to the cart and clears the search input
The popup closes when the search input is cleared or focus is lost

file_operations.description: Add a search popup (using a Popover or Command component) that appears below the unified search input when the user types at least 1 character. Filter all inventory items (from useAllInventoryItems) by name matching the search query. Display matching items in the popup as a clickable list. When a user clicks a search result, add the item to the cart using the existing addToCart logic and clear the search input. Close the popup when the search input is cleared or when the user clicks outside the popup. Include both goods and services in search results regardless of whether they are in the pinned 10.
